tasks_completed.notes: Sidebar (Dashboard, Products, Categories, Orders, Analytics) with active highlighting. Sticky header with user email + logout. Collapsible mobile drawer with backdrop. Hidden chrome on /admin/login. Renamed src/app/(admin) → src/app/admin so URLs (/admin/dashboard etc.) actually match the middleware and existing /admin/* hrefs.

Four stat cards (today sales, orders today, pending, low stock) wired to /api/admin/analytics + /api/admin/alerts/low-stock via TanStack Query. Recent orders table (last 5). Quick actions (Add product, View all orders).
Sortable table with thumbnail, name, price, stock badge, category, status. Debounced search, category + stock-status filters, pagination, bulk-select + bulk delete with confirmation dialog.

react-hook-form + zod validation. Multi-language name + description fields, price/original_price/stock numeric inputs, category dropdown sourced from /api/admin/categories, multi-image manager with primary selection, featured/on_sale toggles. POST/PUT via TanStack Query mutations, success/error toasts via sonner.
Indented tree view with parent/child grouping. Add/edit modals share zod-validated form; parent dropdown disables self + descendants on edit to prevent cycles. Delete confirmation dialog.
Filters: status dropdown, date_from/date_to, debounced search by order # / email. Sort toggles for date, total, status. URL-synced state. Pagination.
Order header with status update dropdown (PUT /api/admin/orders/[id]). Customer + shipping address + line items table + totals. Print button with @media print styles that hide sidebar/header.

Recharts (installed) line chart for revenue, bar chart for orders, top-products list. Date-range selector (7d/30d/90d/1y). Embedded on dashboard; standalone /admin/analytics page with weekly/monthly summaries.

supporting_changes.purpose: shadcn UI primitives (badge, table, dialog, textarea, select, switch, skeleton)

supporting_changes.notes: Renamed (admin) route group → admin so /admin/* URLs work. Updated middleware to redirect to /admin/login (instead of /login) and login form default redirect to /admin/dashboard. Smoke test now visits /admin/login.

supporting_changes.purpose: fix preexisting prefer-const lint errors so CI lint stays green

verification.lint: npm run lint → 0 errors, 27 warnings (all preexisting any-types from API routes)
verification.build: npm run build → all 24 pages compile and prerender; all /admin/* pages registered as dynamic routes
verification.manual_e2e: Suggested: log in as admin@whitelabel.local / admin123456 on Vercel preview

notes: API contract for image upload (POST /api/admin/upload) is not yet implemented in the backend. The ImageUploader currently accepts hosted image URLs; once Alpha ships the upload endpoint, swap the URL input for a file picker that POSTs to it.

GET /api/admin/products/[id] is not exposed by Beta yet; the edit page hydrates from the list endpoint as a workaround. Replace fetchAdminProduct in src/lib/admin/api.ts when the detail endpoint ships.
Top-products list on /admin/analytics currently mirrors the low-stock feed as a placeholder until Beta exposes a top-sellers analytics breakdown.
